UserAppState.title: UserAppState
UserAppState.description: The complete prompt and category state of a single user.

gates.description: List of gates / categories created by the user.

prompts.description: List of prompts belonging to user categories.

updatedAt.description: The last time this state was updated on the server/client.

/users/{userId}/data/appState.description: Stores the synchronized prompt state for a specific user ID.
